data.name: 继母和我做色情片
data.detailed_description:
你真的很想跟你的繼母上床對吧？她為了給你那老爸買禮物，落得個經濟拮据的下場。她覺得進退兩難，不好意思向你那混蛋老爸要錢，因為那份禮物原本是想給他一個驚喜。於是你匿名給她發了私訊——提出了一個提議……一段她瘋狂地騎在繼子陰莖上的自製影片。

沒錯，這是男人為了得到女人而精心策劃的最周密的計畫。我們的主角正在醞釀著這一切。你那位事業有成的老爸一心撲在工作上，對賢惠的妻子視而不見，還總是嘮叨你沒出人頭地，或者說些老掉牙的蠢話。他甚至不知道他看似宅在家裡的兒子還有一份副業。

你那黯淡無光的家庭生活中唯一的陽光就是你光彩照人的繼母。她善良、體貼、溫柔，而且……或許，在她平靜的外表下，還隱藏著一個壓抑已久、性慾旺盛、極度渴望的女人，正等待著被釋放！

制定一個淫蕩的計劃，從你那不負責任的老爸身邊把繼母搶過來，用老古板根本無法想像的方式滿足她！你會培養她，讓她發揮全部潛能，成為終極的超級熟女性玩具嗎？或者，你會把她從這段沒有愛的婚姻中拯救出來，用愛（以及其他事物）讓她快樂起來？或許……你這麼做只是為了報復你那混蛋老爸，想用這些罪惡至極的影片狠狠打擊他？

在《繼母和我做色情片》中，一切由你決定。

特色

  • 原版日文視覺小說的英文翻譯版

  • 水木全程配音，保留原版日語對話

  • 原版高清畫風，提供 16:9 和 4:3 兩種比例

  • 數小時的劇情內容

  • 包含音樂、特效以及 OrcSoft 標誌性呻吟聲的音頻，貫穿整個性愛場景！

  • 動畫角色立繪增強

  • 畫廊和場景選擇

  • 大量 H 場景，以及 4 個基於你一路選擇的邪惡結局！

《繼母和我做色情片》是由日本傳奇遊戲開發商 Orcsoft 製作的視覺小說的英文在地化版本。 Cherry Kiss 致力於為日本以外的玩家提供原汁原味的日文視覺小說體驗。

**請注意**

本遊戲中所有描述與視覺呈現的角色均已年滿18歲，且本遊戲製作過程中未使用任何未成年人（不論其身分為何）。

data.short_description: 很久很久以前，兒子從父親身邊搶走了繼母，兩人因為衝動的選擇私奔，從此過上了幸福的生活；或者說……她變成了一個有受虐傾向以及性癮的自慰者，一心只想被男人的陰莖填滿！
data.supported_languages: 英文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 泰文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 / 8 / 8.1 / 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX-compatible sound

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Version: 10.10+
  • 處理器: Apple M1 or Intel Core M
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Open GL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

data.name: Mizuki and Me Make a Porno
data.detailed_description:
Check this out, you really want to bang your step-mom yeah? She got herself into some money troubles trying to get a nice gift for your rotten old man. Feeling trapped, unable to ask your absolute piece of a father for the dough since the stupid gift was meant to be a surprise for his neglectful ass. You slide into her DMs, incognito—with a certain proposition... homemade, amateur footage, her bouncing on her step-son's cock CRAZY style.

That's right, it's the most elaborate scheme devised by man to get some puss. Our protagonist Haruta was cooking. Big-shot pops is married to his job - ignoring his absolute gem of a wife, getting on your case for not pulling yourself up by your bootstraps, or whatever baloney that generation loves to spout. He doesn't even know about the side hustle his diamond-handed shut-in son has on the side.

Your ray of sunshine in an otherwise miserable home life is your radiant step-mom Mizuki. She's kind, supportive, gentle, and maybe... just maybe there is a pent up, perverted, diabolically horny woman juuuuust beneath the surface waiting to be unleashed!

Set a salacious scheme into motion and steal Mizuki from your deadbeat dad by satisfying her in ways that vanilla-ass couldn't even imagine! Will you train her to realize her full potential as the ultimate mega MILF sex toy? Or perhaps, will you save her from this loveless marriage showering her with affection (and other things) to make her happy? Or maybe... you're doing this all just to spite your piece of shit father sticking it to him by sending some of this absolute sinful cinema to crush him?

The choice is yours in Mizuki and Me Make a Porno!

FEATURES

  • Translated version of the original Japanese Visual Novel

  • Mizuki is fully voiced with original Japanese dialogue

  • Original artwork HD upscaled with 16:9 and 4:3 variants

  • Hours of story content

  • Audio, including music, special effects, and the signature OrcSoft Moans during sex scenes! 

  • Enhanced with animated character sprites

  • Gallery and Scene selections

  • Loads of H-Scenes and 4 devilish endings based on the choices you make along the way!

Mizuki and Me Make a Porno is the English localization of a Visual Novel created by legendary Japanese developer Orcsoft. We at Cherry Kiss aim to provide an authentic Japanese Visual Novel experience to gamers outside of Japan.

**PLEASE NOTE**

All characters described and visually represented in this game are over 18 years of age, and no actual nor identifiable minor was used in the production of this game.
